bluetooth_confirm.description: Add the BT610 sensor found via Bluetooth?

user.description: Select a BT610. If the list is empty, note that the device does not advertise while the Sentrius mobile app is connected to it.

abort.not_supported: Device is not a supported BT610
abort.no_devices_found: No BT610 devices found. The device does not advertise while the Sentrius app is connected to it.
